Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Excise Act (non-alcoholic beer)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Excise Act (non-alcoholic beer)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Excise Act in order to abolish duties of excise on beer or malt liquor containing not more than 0.5% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Subsection.Text: The portion of section 3 in Part II of the schedule to the Excise Act before paragraph (a) is replaced by the following:

Section.Text: Per hectolitre of beer or malt liquor containing more than 0.5% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume but not more than 1.2% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume,

Subsection.Text: Part II of the schedule to the Act is amended by adding the following after section 3:

Section.Text: Per hectolitre of beer or malt liquor containing not more than 0.5% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume, $0.
